en: What's up, everybody? Come spend the day with me, Bobby M.
ko: 안녕, 다들? 나 바비 M이랑 하루를 보내자.

en: You know me. I'm just eating burritos, getting ready for the day.
ko: 나 알지. 부리또 먹으면서 하루 준비 중.

en: Gotta dance with my coffee. You know me. I'm Bobby M.
ko: 커피랑 춤춰야 해. 나 알지. 나 바비 M.
다들 그게 내 스타일인 거 알아.

en: Just gotta put makeup on my legs because that's a thing humans do.
ko: 다리에 화장해야 해, 인간이 하는 일이니까.

en: Walking down the hall, getting ready for the shoot.
Hoppers is coming out soon. That's my little outfit. Don't I look crazy?
ko: 호퍼스가 곧 나와. 저게 내 의상이야. 미쳐 보이지 않아?

en: That's what the kids say today. They say,
Oh, look at this old man. Who is this?
Oh, he looks like he's not doing well.
But we're gonna take pictures with him anyway.
Look at us. A one, young, bright, shining star and an old, old man.
ko: 봐. 하나는 젊고 빛나는 스타, 하나는 늙은 아저씨.

en: I'm just kidding. Look, it's a beaver!
That's the cutest beaver I've ever seen.
ko: 내가 본 것 중 가장 귀여운 비버야.

en: That's my day. I love you. Bye. Gonna have 12 more burritos.
ko: 이게 내 하루야. 사랑해. 안녕. 부리또 12개 더 먹을 거야.
